message:
🐛 Fix missed isDemoModeForced replacement in fullFetchClusters (#695)

The previous PR missed two occurrences of isDemoModeForced in the
fullFetchClusters function. This fixes the "isDemoModeForced is not defined"
runtime error.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
